message:
feat: implement streaming scan for Gemini, Claude Code, and Codex connectors

Add supports_streaming_scan() to the Connector trait (default: false) so
callers can distinguish connectors with true callback-based streaming from
those that fall back to materializing the full corpus.

Connectors updated:
- mod.rs: add supports_streaming_scan() default method returning false
- claude_code.rs: override to return true (already had scan_with_callback)
- codex.rs: override to return true (already had scan_with_callback)
- gemini.rs: refactor scan logic into standalone scan_gemini_with_callback()
  so both scan() and scan_with_callback() share the same code path without
  materializing the full Vec first. Override supports_streaming_scan() = true.
  Add test asserting streaming and batch scan produce identical results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
